---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    css: ../cv_style_webpage_2column.css
    theme: default
    format-links: false
    grid:
      body-width: 920px
---

```{r}
#| label: required-packages
#| echo: false
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| label: publications
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Full publication list, generated from Bibliography/cv_publications.bib
# (see sync_zotero.R). Shared parsing/formatting is in publications.R.
# The CV (CV.qmd) shows a selected subset and links here.
source("publications.R")
bib_path <- "Bibliography/cv_publications.bib"

pubs <- parse_publications(bib_path)
peer_reviewed <- Filter(function(r) !is_report(r), pubs)
reports       <- Filter(is_report, pubs)

cat("::: {.publications}\n\n")
cat("::: {.pubs-header}\n\n")
cat("## Publications\n\n")
cat("[← Back to CV](CV.html){.all-pubs-link}\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")
if (length(peer_reviewed)) {
  cat("### Peer-reviewed publications\n\n")
  for (r in peer_reviewed) cat(format_entry(r), "\n\n")
}
if (length(reports)) {
  cat("### Reports\n\n")
  for (r in reports) cat(format_entry(r), "\n\n")
}
cat(":::\n\n")
```
